revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-020

Alternative term: Slave

In radio navigation, a station in which some characteristic of its emission is controlled by a master station.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Slave station}}
